label: Run Code Trigger
description: Runs setup code that can start connected nodes by calling fire.
comment: [VSR] Advanced raw Luau trigger. The exported code provides fire(customContext) for graph flow.
debugHints: The code can use triggerObject, triggerContext, VRS, resolveTarget, makeVector3, and fire(customContext).
Call fire({ value = ... }) whenever the connected visual flow should run.

parameters.label: Concerned Object
parameters.description: Object used as the default flow object.

parameters.label: Script Code
parameters.description: Runs setup code. Call fire from that code when the connected nodes should run.

beginnerSummary: Run authored script code that decides when the connected flow starts.
